matches.x: 22Now in-tho: first year of Cyrus king of: Persia, that the word of. the Lord: spoken: by the mouth of. Jeremiah might be accomplished, the Lord stirred: up the. spirit:.of: Cyrus: king of Persia, that he made a proclamation throughout‘all his kingdom, ‘and put it-also in writing, saying,
But in the first year of Cyrus 1 king of Babylon, Cyrus the king made a decree to build this house of God.
